LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave.description: Ruthless remnants of the old world government, the Enclave believe themselves to be humanityâ€™s rightful rulers. Isolated, technologically advanced, and fiercely nationalistic, they seek to restore civilization under their iron-fisted visionâ€”no matter the cost to outsiders.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave.label: The Enclave
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave_Player.description: You are operatives of the Enclave, the shadow government that considers itself the rightful heir to the United States of America. Armed with advanced pre-war technology and an unwavering belief in your genetic and technological superiority, you seek to restore America to its former glory - by any means necessary. The wasteland is filled with mutants and degenerates who have no place in the new America you will build.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave_Player.label: The Enclave
